name: RPlog_talk_Greeting_the_Newcomers
title: Talk Page: Where to Categorize This Log
summary: This is an out-of-character wiki talk page for the Greeting the Newcomers log, containing a single message in which the editor Wrista asks whether the log, which occurs during the Dac Civil War, belongs among the Dac logs or should have its own section. There is no in-character roleplay content.
